Observation base_record_id route_m15-local-20100607 matches existing registry record route_m15-local-20100607 exactly. Registry record is sourced from the same document (20100607_1st2nd_cb6_slides) with matching payload: M15, local, Manhattan. Observation already resolves to this id.

Observation base_record_id 'entity_mta-nyct' matches the existing canonical registry record 'entity_mta-nyct' (MTA NYCT Reference), which already lists this source (20100607_1st2nd_cb6_slides) and carries the alias 'entity_mta-nyct-20100607'. Observation base_record_id 'entity_nyc-dot' matches the existing canonical registry record 'entity_nyc-dot' (NYC DOT as Publisher), which already lists this source (20100607_1st2nd_cb6_slides) and carries the alias 'entity_nyc-dot-20100607'. The observation resolves to its own base record.

Observation's base_record_id 'project_first-second-ave-sbs-2010' matches an existing registry record with identical record_id, project_name ('First Avenue/Second Avenue Select Bus Service'), and source_id ('20100607_1st2nd_cb6_slides'). Per identity rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that record.

The observation resolves to its own base_record_id corridor_first-second-avenues-brt, which is the correct canonical record: both describe the First Avenue/Second Avenue corridor in Manhattan from South Ferry to 125th Street (8.5 miles), served by M15 SBS. The registry record already lists 20100607_1st2nd_cb6_slides as a source and includes the same block evidence refs. No different registry record is a closer or better match.

proposed_relations.description: First Avenue 2010 parking regulation plan as part of First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: The diagram shows the 2010 plan for First Avenue parking regulations between 57 St and 14 St. The street is divided into several zones: Bus Lane: 57 St to 50 St. Includes Commercial Loading (7am-4pm) and Bus Lane (4pm-7pm). Comm. Loading: 50 St to 42 St. Restricted: No Stopping or No Standing: 42 St to 23 St. Authorized Parking: 23 St to 28 St. Restricted: No Stopping or No Standing: 28 St to 14 St.

rationale: Claim describes the First Avenue 2010 parking plan which is a design element of the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS project.

Peak Period Parking Restrictions with Midday Commercial Loading: 50 St to 42 St (orange). Bus Lane: 42 St to 28 St (red). Metered Parking, Daytime: 28 St to 23 St (purple). No Stopping Anytime: 23 St to 14 St (teal).

rationale: Claim describes the Second Avenue 2010 parking plan which is a design element of the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS project.
